description: Account password reset needed at next login. No urgency; logging for record-keeping purposes.
short_description: Password reset reminder at next login

description: Unable to log into the counseling portal (ScholarConnect). Login page loads but credentials are rejected despite confirmed correct password. Issue began after the district-wide password policy update on 2025-11-20. Affects access to student records and appointment scheduling.
short_description: Counseling portal login issue after district password policy update

description: Parent notification emails sent via the district's automated system are delayed by 2-4 hours before delivery. Confirmed delay for three separate notifications sent on 2025-11-22. Recipients include parents of students with scheduled counseling appointments. Timely delivery is required for appointment reminders.
short_description: Parent notification email delay from district automated system
